info.description: A human/AI collaborative task tracker with kanban boards and workflow state machines.
info.title: TaskFlow API

post.summary: Execute multiple operations in a single request (max 50)

get.summary: Get audit log for a board

List tags in use on a board with counts

post.summary: Add a comment to a task
Transition a task to a new state
